query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') != 'null' AND JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') != '""' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comPercentil FROM ultrassons WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') != '""';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') != 'null' AND JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') != '""' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comPercentil FROM ultrassons WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') != '""';
